chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT C.P.No,D-477 0f2015. LARKANA Date or Order with signature of Judge Hearing Of case Eنهعg of ain case 1&.10.2017. Mr Muhammad Afzal Jagirani Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio Addl,A.G Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition may be disposed of by directing ٨٤ official respondents aCI strictly accordance with law and to provide legal protection to the petitioner as and when required by her Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of ٧ D G E J UD G E hearing
